# Unscreenshot

> Upload your screenshots. AI turns them into reminders with deadlines. You get nudged before they expire.

Unscreenshot is a web productivity tool that converts screenshots into actionable reminders. Users drag screenshots from their camera roll, an AI analyzes each image to extract intent, assigns a category, and sets an appropriate deadline. The app then notifies the user before each deadline expires.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product landing page with feature overview and sign-up CTA.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Beta pricing and plan details.
- [Privacy Policy](/legal/privacy): Data collection, usage, and user rights.
- [Terms of Service](/legal/terms): Service terms, acceptable use, and liability.
